---
title: "Publications"
---

Publications are listed below. For a full list, see our [Google Scholar page](https://scholar.google.com/) or [ORCID profiles](https://orcid.org/).

---

## 2024

> **Author A**, Author B, Author C. (2024). *Title of the paper.* *Journal Name*, vol(issue), pages. [DOI](https://doi.org)

---

## 2023

> **Author A**, Author B. (2023). *Title of another paper.* *Journal Name*, vol(issue), pages. [DOI](https://doi.org)

---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Preprints
Recent preprints are available on [bioRxiv](https://www.biorxiv.org/).
:::
